name: equuscronos-monorepo
description: Sistema integral de gestión de competencias ecuestres
author: EquusCronos Team

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const cp = require('child_process'); const path = fs.existsSync('libs/shared') ? 'libs/shared' : '../../libs/shared'; cp.execSync('npm run build --prefix ' + path, { stdio: 'inherit' });"
scripts.eas-build-post-install: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const cp = require('child_process'); const path = fs.existsSync('libs/shared') ? 'libs/shared' : '../../libs/shared'; cp.execSync('npm run build --prefix ' + path, { stdio: 'inherit' });"
